amendment.description: An amendment numbered 1 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to require the area encompassing the Columbia Basin Project be included in the Western Waters Regional Conservation Area.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Baumgartner amendment (A002) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Baumgartner amendment (A002) Agreed to by voice vote.
